name: systems-thinking-toolkit
description: Systems thinking toolkit grounded in Dennis Sherwood, Seeing the Forest for the Trees (2002). 7 functional skills + 1 router. Carry-1 cld-craft (prose → fully-annotated Mermaid CLD; 12 hygiene rules + Rule 7 fuzzy elevation + R/B classification + Sterman uniflow discipline; v0.8 optional CLD falsifiability protocol — 6 falsification tests for high-stakes decisions) feeds downstream: cld-archetypes (limits-to-growth + variance/target/action), cld-overlay (outward stakeholder straddle), team-mental-model (inward convergence + leadership energy proxies), strategy-lever-and-cascade (v0.6 Martian-test inline; v0.7 STOP rule + HOLD-lever), simulation-modeling (CLD → stock-flow, text-only). Plus V1-weak manager-personality-quadrant with v0.9 Graduate Routing decision tree (5-question router exiting to peer-reviewed alternatives Hogan/Big Five/Heifetz/Edmondson/Klein/Hofstede/Tuckman/Lencioni before sk14 facilitation). v0.9 adds 4 platform-economy R-loop cases: Case 13 network effects (Metcalfe), Case 14 two-sided market chicken-and-egg, Case 15 winner-take-most algorithm concentration, Case A5 platform saturation limits-to-growth — all filling Sherwood's pre-2010 platform-economy blind spot (Parker/Van Alstyne 2005, Eisenmann 2006). Distilled via tsundoku:book-distill RIA-TV++ pipeline. システム思考ツールキット — Sherwood 2002 ベース。系統思考工具組 — Sherwood 2002 為本。
